name: babel-o
description: Nexus-first rewrite of BabeL-X with a lightweight interactive CLI.

scripts.lint: npm run typecheck && npm run format:check && npm run deps:audit
scripts.build: node scripts/clean-dist.js && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node scripts/copy-built-in-skills.js
scripts.test: NODE_ENV=test BABEL_O_CONFIG_FILE=/tmp/babel-o-test-config.json tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 test/adapters.test.ts test/build-binary-script.test.ts test/agent-profiles.test.ts
